dedication.text_template: Pour {child_name}, que cette aventure te rappelle combien tu es courageux.

page_1.text_template: {child_name} ouvre la porte du grand bois et entend les arbres lui souhaiter la bienvenue.

summary.text_template: {child_name} repart avec un secret precieux : le courage grandit a chaque pas.

dedication.text_template: For {child_name}, may this adventure remind you how brave you are.

page_1.text_template: {child_name} opens the door to the great forest and hears the trees welcoming them.

summary.text_template: {child_name} leaves with a precious secret: courage grows with every step.

dedication.text_template: Voor {child_name}, moge dit avontuur je eraan herinneren hoe dapper je bent.

page_1.text_template: {child_name} opent de deur naar het grote woud en hoort de bomen {child_name} verwelkomen met een zacht gefluister.

summary.text_template: {child_name} vertrekt met een kostbaar geheim: moed groeit met elke stap.

rules: All locales must maintain semantic alignment

editorialScore.rationale: Story arc stays age-appropriate and emotionally clear.

imageabilityScore.rationale: Scenes are concrete and highly illustratable.

heroConsistencyScore.rationale: Hero identity rules are explicit enough for the pilot.

localeCompletenessScore.rationale: FR, EN, and NL all contain book and page nodes.
